allow: Bash(awk '/^commit/{commit=$2} /stroke-dasharray.*2\\.83.*toFixed|toFixed.*2\\.83.*283/{found=1} found && /^\\-.*toFixed.*283/{print commit" REMOVE: "$0; found=0} found && /^\\+.*2\\.83.*283/{print commit" ADD: "$0; found=0}')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {\(Get-NetTCPConnection -OwningProcess $_.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).LocalPort -contains 3000} | Stop-Process -Force')

PowerShell(npx eslint lib/plans.ts app/api/webhook/route.ts app/api/analyze/route.ts app/api/analyses/route.ts app/api/cron/weekly-summary-email/route.ts app/api/auth/callback/route.ts app/dashboard/DashboardClient.tsx components/TradeReport.tsx components/TradeJournal.tsx lib/emails/confirmationPaiement.ts app/pricing/page.tsx proxy.ts 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 40)

Bash(git --no-pager diff -- lib/demoTrades.ts lib/weeklyData.ts lib/parseCSV/parseMT4.ts lib/parseCSV/parseFTMO.ts lib/parseCSV/parseBinance.ts lib/parseCSV/parseBybit.ts lib/parseCSV/parseTradingView.ts)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $f = Get-Item "public\\logo.png"; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($f.FullName\); "logo.png : $\($img.Width\) x $\($img.Height\) px, $\([math]::Round\($f.Length/1KB,1\)\) KB \($\($f.Length\) octets\), format pixel: $\($img.PixelFormat\), DPI: $\($img.HorizontalResolution\)x$\($img.VerticalResolution\)"; $img.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($files = "app\\twitter-image.tsx", "app\\robots.ts", "app\\layout.tsx"; "AVANT :"; foreach \($f in $files\) { $i = Get-Item $f; "{0}  —  création : {1}  —  modification : {2}" -f $f, $i.CreationTime, $i.LastWriteTime })

PowerShell($now = Get-Date; $files = "app\\twitter-image.tsx", "app\\robots.ts", "app\\layout.tsx"; foreach \($f in $files\) { $i = Get-Item $f; $i.CreationTime = $now; $i.LastWriteTime = $now }; foreach \($f in $files\) { $i = Get-Item $f; "{0}  —  création : {1}  —  modification : {2}" -f $f, $i.CreationTime, $i.LastWriteTime })
